title: pleopeltis × cerro-altoensis
intro: Pleopeltis × cerro-altoensis, also known as the Cerro Alto Spikemoss, is a rare species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pleopeltis × cerro-altoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and treat respiratory issues.
